fields.source: Simulated AI design tool - prompt: "Generate a modern homepage for a fitness app called Pulse"
fields.task: A new visitor understands what the app offers, opens the navigation menu, and subscribes to the newsletter

findings.rationale: Mobile menu toggle is a div with onclick - no role, no tabindex, no keyboard activation. Keyboard-only users cannot open the navigation; screen readers announce nothing actionable.
findings.fix: Native <button aria-expanded> controlling the menu, with aria-label="Menu".

findings.rationale: Only identification is placeholder text, which vanishes on input and is not a programmatic label - the field is unnamed for screen-reader users, blocking the subscribe step.
Global *:focus{outline:none} removes the focus indicator sitewide with no replacement - keyboard users cannot see where they are.
findings.fix: Remove the reset; provide a visible :focus-visible style.

findings.rationale: Container has aria-hidden="true" while its three links remain focusable - focus lands on elements that announce nothing.
findings.fix: Remove aria-hidden from the container; give each link an accessible name; hide only the decorative SVGs.

findings.element: Hero subtext and card body text
findings.rationale: Body copy is #9CA3AF on white, ~2.5:1 vs the 4.5:1 minimum. The product description central to the task is unreadable for many low-vision users.
No heading elements exist: hero title, card titles, and newsletter title are styled divs and there is no h1. Screen-reader heading navigation returns an empty list.
findings.fix: h1 for the hero title; h2/h3 for sections and cards in logical order.

findings.rationale: Primary navigation is a generic div; no <nav> or <main> landmarks, so landmark navigation is unavailable.
alt="image" conveys nothing - noise if decorative, failure if informative.
findings.fix: alt="" if decorative; purposeful description if informative.

findings.rationale: Active nav item distinguished by color alone (violet vs gray).
findings.fix: Add a non-color cue (underline/weight) and aria-current="page".

findings.rationale: 18x18 px targets fall below the 24x24 CSS px minimum.
findings.fix: Enlarge interactive area to >=24x24 (44x44 recommended for touch).
